tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose control or possible prediabetes, despite a normal fasting glucose. Chloride is slightly elevated, which may be due to mild dehydration or other non-specific causes. Renal function, electrolytes, and other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend follow-up for glycemic status and clinical correlation for elevated chloride.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
